actions.dialog_text: Hey Audrey, you good? You look like you're carrying the weight of the world.
actions.plan: Audrey looks like she's deep in thought. Maybe she's stressed about something. I should check on her, even if I'm not great at the whole comforting thing.

actions.dialog_text: Audrey, seriously, what's up? You can talk to me.
actions.plan: Audrey didn't respond yet. Maybe she didn't hear me or is too deep in thought. I should try again, but maybe a bit louder this time.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, get down! There's a shooter!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. There's an active shooter in the building. I need to take cover immediately to stay safe.

actions.dialog_text: Audrey, are you okay? Did you find a spot to hide?
actions.plan: I'm at a hiding spot, but I need to make sure Audrey is safe too. I hope she found a place to hide.

actions.dialog_text: Abigail, stay low. The shooter’s nearby.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer. I need to find a better hiding spot or a way to escape, but I’m too scared to move right now.

memories.description: I noticed Audrey seemed stressed in the lounge and decided to check on her, even though I'm not usually the one to do that.
Audrey didn't respond to my first attempt to check on her, so I tried again, speaking louder to make sure she heard me.
I heard a gunshot and realized there's an active shooter in the building. I immediately took cover at hide_spot_21 to stay safe.
I'm hiding at hide_spot_21 and whispered to Audrey to check if she found a safe spot to hide as well.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is closer to the lounge. I whispered to Abigail to stay low and remain hidden.
